problem id: 0c7acd69
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  00000111 -> 00001110
  01101001 -> 11010010
  11101110 -> 11011101
  00100110 -> 01001100
  11100111 -> 11001111
  00101101 -> 01011010
  00101111 -> 01011110
  01110011 -> 11100110
  11000010 -> 10000101
  01110110 -> 11101100

query: 11111010
predicted answer: 11110101
